rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SNR indicates poor signal quality.
suggestedActions: Use proper shielding for sensitive measurements.
Consider efficiency losses in energy calculations.

description.short: Calculate lens optical power (diopters) from focal length.
description.long: Calculate lens optical power (diopters) from focal length.

short_i18n.en: Calculate lens optical power (diopters) from focal length.
short_i18n.tr: Mercegin isigi kirma gucunu (diyoptri) odak uzakligindan hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die optische Leistung einer Linse (Dioptrien) aus der Brennweite.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la puissance optique d'une lentille (dioptries) à partir de la distance focale.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la potencia óptica de una lente (dioptrías) a partir de la distancia focal.
short_i18n.ar: حساب القدرة البصرية للعدسة (الديوبتر) من البعد البؤري.

title_i18n.fr: Calculateur de puissance de lentille dioptrique
title_i18n.es: Calculadora de potencia de lente dióptrica
